raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX XXXX, I initially purchased goods from XXXX of the XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX totalling {$250.00}. They charged my card for the proper amount. Then, they upsold me for a machine that including the machine and product previously purchased I would be charged {$6000.00}. Then, once again, I was upsold to a total of {$6700.00} of which a lamp would be shipped and all other charges would be reversed. They did reverse the {$250.00}. However, they charged an additional {$6700.00} and did not reverse the {$6000.00} charge. When I returned home and saw the charges on my Citibank credit card, I notified Citibank immediately and disputed the charges. XXXX XXXX XXXX  XXXX XXXX subsequently shipped the lamp via XXXX which I refused to accept due to the discrepancy of the amounts charged. I provided Citibank with a copy of the XXXX information showing where the company had accepted back the shipment. 

Additionally, I have found that this company ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX ) has a very bad reputation for this kind of action. They are also advertising their products as being FDA approved but I have subsequently found out this to be another untruth. 
Citibank is trying to extort payment of the entire {$12000.00} plus interest during the disputed time frame. I am opening another dispute with them but was advised to file a complaint with The Consumer Protection Bureau as well.
